title: Job Opening Software Engineer at Cognizant Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Software Engineer at Cognizant Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
We at Cognizant Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Software Engineer based out of Patna. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Cognizant Digital Technologies:
Cognizant Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cognizant Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
